programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - Super Dessert
programme.desc: The top five contestants must replicate a challenging dessert created by award-winning chef, Michael Meredith.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 03 - MasterClass #7
programme.desc: Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook their favourite desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: MasterChef New Zealand returns for its fourth season.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - EP2
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants face two sudden death challenges to find who will go through to the Top 16.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Master Hangi
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef mansion, then face a team hangi challenge on Mokoia Island.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Mexican
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must cook authentic Mexican dishes for guest chef Jose Carlos de la Macorra.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Biggest Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face the biggest mystery box challenge ever.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Samoa / Cooking on Fire
programme.desc: The Top Six duos cook on open fires on the beach at Return To Paradise resort in Samoa.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 05 - Josh & Simon / Degustation
programme.desc: MasterChef judges Simon Gault and Josh Emett cook two degustation-style dishes .

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP1
programme.desc: From over 5,000 Applicants the top 50 Junior cooks gather for the first challenges of the Junior MasterChef Series.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP2
programme.desc: The remaining kids have their chance to cook their best dishes for a chance to make it through to the top 20.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP3
programme.desc: The top 20 learn that they will be cooking in an invention test with two core ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP4
programme.desc: The excited top 12 arrive at the MasterChef Kitchen for the first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: In their first offsite challenge, the kids are divided into teams to take over a High School tuck shop.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: 10 kids from our top 50 join us for the first Cook-along MasterClass in the MasterChef Kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: In week 2 the kids find out that they have 3 more chances to win points before the first elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: Today 4 kids will be going home and 8 will move onto the second stage in the Junior MasterChef competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP9
programme.desc: It’s MasterClass time and 12 lucky students join Gary, George and Anna.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP11
programme.desc: The Blue Team Sofia, Jack, Cassidy & Nick face a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: In Today’s MasterClass the Judges are joined by 6 Members of the Stephanie Alexander Kitchen Garden program.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP18
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP24
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP30
programme.desc: Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP110
programme.desc: The scoreboard has been wiped clean and to earn points The top 8 faces a basic skills test.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Auditions
programme.desc: The competition kicks off with 1000 amateur cooks.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Finding The Top 12
programme.desc: The Top 24 amateur cooks face three gruelling challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - 12 Ways With Chicken
programme.desc: The Top 12 contestants move into a luxury home on Auckland's North Shore.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Signature Dish Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 11 contestants face a tough challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - A Day At The Races
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants have a day at the races at Ellerslie.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Pie Wars
programme.desc: The Top 9 contestants must make their own pastry and cook two pies.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Canape Frenzy
programme.desc: The Top 8 contestants face a daunting team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Asian Invention Test
programme.desc: The Top 7 contestants face a challenging invention test.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Seafood Barbecue Challenge
programme.desc: The Top 6 contestants face a team challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Super Hard Dessert
programme.desc: The new Top 6 contestants face their most technically-demanding challenge so far.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: The final five contestants cook a 10-course degustation dinner.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - Cookbook Challenge
programme.desc: In the MasterChef New Zealand semi-final, the top four contestants try to impress.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 01 - The Grand Final
programme.desc: The two finalists face gruelling challenges to decide who will win the first-ever MasterChef New Zealand.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge: Santa Monica Pier Food Trucks
programme.desc: Today the contestants are split into teams at the world famous Santa Monica Pier.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Elimination Challenge
programme.desc: The losing team from the Chinese New Year challenge must now cook a dish determined by lucky dip.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge & Invention Test: Quarter Final
programme.desc: Contestants cook off for a place in the Semi Final.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge: Marco Pierre White
programme.desc: The hopeful chefs suit up and show up for Marco Pierre White Week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Service Challenge: Lake House
programme.desc: The Top Five contestants must cook five dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: With immunity up for grabs, contestants will work in pairs to create a savoury & sweet jaffle in 45 minutes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box Challenge: Luke Nguyen & Invention Test
programme.desc: Today's mystery box challenge has been set by guest chef Luke Nguyen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Pressure Test: Jason Atherton's Quail Afternoon Tea Dish
programme.desc: The bottom three from the invention test now face the elimination pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Team Challenge: Pub Lunch
programme.desc: This challenge is all about the pub lunch.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Immunity Challenge
programme.desc: The three best performers from Maggie Beer's mystery box are now vying for immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 08 - Mystery Box: Nigella Lawson
programme.desc: It's Nigella Lawson Week.
